authors: Xuan Yang, Jiayu Liu, Yuhang Lai, Hao Xu, Zhenya Huang, Ning Miao
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong complex reasoning capabilities through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. However, their reasoning patterns remain too complicated to analyze. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful tool for interpretability, existing approaches predominantly operate at the token level, creating a granularity mismatch when capturing more critical step-level information, such as reasoning direction and semantic transitions. In this work, we propose step-level sparse autoencoder (SSAE), which serves as an analytical tool to disentangle different aspects of LLMs' reasoning steps into sparse features. Specifically, by precisely controlling the sparsity of a step feature conditioned on its context, we form an information bottleneck in step reconstruction, which splits incremental information from background information and disentangles it into several sparsely activated dimensions. Experiments on multiple base models and reasoning tasks show the effectiveness of the extracted features. By linear probing, we can easily predict surface-level information, such as generation length and first token distribution, as well as more complicated properties, such as the correctness and logicality of the step. These observations indicate that LLMs should already at least partly know about these properties during generation, which provides the foundation for the self-verification ability of LLMs. The code is available at https://github.com/Miaow-Lab/SSAE
title_zh: 用于推理过程解释的逐层稀疏自编码器
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）通过思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）推理实现了强大的复杂推理能力。然而，其推理模式仍然过于复杂，难以分析。尽管稀疏自编码器（Sparse Autoencoders, SAEs）已成为一种强有力的可解释性工具，但现有方法主要在词元（token）层面操作，在捕捉更关键的步骤级信息（如推理方向和语义转换）时存在粒度不匹配的问题。在本工作中，我们提出了步骤级稀疏自编码器（Step-level Sparse Autoencoder, SSAE），作为一种分析工具，能够将LLM推理步骤中的不同方面解耦为稀疏特征。具体而言，通过精确控制在上下文条件下的步骤特征稀疏性，我们在步骤重建过程中构建了一个信息瓶颈，从而将增量信息与背景信息分离，并将其解耦为若干稀疏激活的维度。在多个基础模型和推理任务上的实验表明，所提取的特征具有显著有效性。通过线性探测，我们能够轻松预测表面级信息（如生成长度和首个词元分布），以及更复杂的属性（如步骤的正确性和逻辑性）。这些观察表明，LLM在生成过程中至少部分地“知道”这些属性，为LLM的自我验证能力提供了基础。代码已开源，地址为：https://github.com/Miaow-Lab/SSAE

title: It's Alive! What a Live Object Environment Changes in Software Engineering Practice
authors: Julián Grigera, Steven Costiou, Juan Cruz Gardey, Stéphane Ducasse
abstract: Tools shape our mind. This is why it is important to have extensible and flexible tools for developers to adapt to their needs. Reasoning about programs in the abstract -- by imagining what objects should look like -- can make it harder to grasp the underlying model. In Smalltalk environments like Pharo, developers work closely with their objects, gaining immediate feedback -- not guessing how they will look like but directly interacting with them. This article presents some tools developers use in Pharo: Inspector custom views for defining specific views and navigation for objects, Microcommits for reverting changes without the need to commit and pull, Xtreme TDD that allows developers to code in the debugger, On the Fly Rewriting Deprecations that support API evolution through automated rewriting of deprecated calls, and Object-Centric Breakpoints -- when a problem cannot be efficiently solved with a dummy trace, developers can use break points that will only halt for a given instance. By showcasing these features that evolved alongside Smalltalk, we invite reflection on how other IDEs could rethink some of their features and improve developers' workflows.
title_zh: 它活了！一个活跃的对象环境如何改变软件工程实践
abstract_zh: 工具塑造我们的思维。正因如此，为开发者提供可扩展且灵活的工具，使其能够根据自身需求进行调整，显得尤为重要。在抽象层面推理程序——比如想象对象应该长什么样——反而可能使开发者难以理解底层模型。在像 Pharo 这样的 Smalltalk 环境中，开发者能直接与对象紧密互动，获得即时反馈——不是猜测对象会是什么样子，而是直接与它们交互。本文介绍了一些 Pharo 开发者常用的工具：用于定义特定视图和对象导航的自定义检查器（Inspector）视图、无需提交和拉取即可回滚更改的 Microcommits、允许开发者在调试器中直接编码的 Xtreme TDD、通过自动重写已弃用调用支持 API 演进的“即时重写弃用”功能，以及仅对特定实例触发的面向对象的断点——当普通的模拟追踪无法高效解决问题时，开发者可以使用这种断点。通过展示这些伴随 Smalltalk 发展而来的特性，我们希望引发对其他 IDE 如何重新思考其功能、从而提升开发者工作流的深入思考。

title: Reducing Labeling Effort in Architecture Technical Debt Detection through Active Learning and Explainable AI
authors: Edi Sutoyo, Paris Avgeriou, Andrea Capiluppi
abstract: Self-Admitted Technical Debt (SATD) refers to technical compromises explicitly admitted by developers in natural language artifacts such as code comments, commit messages, and issue trackers. Among its types, Architecture Technical Debt (ATD) is particularly difficult to detect due to its abstract and context-dependent nature. Manual annotation of ATD is costly, time-consuming, and challenging to scale. This study focuses on reducing labeling effort in ATD detection by combining keyword-based filtering with active learning and explainable AI. We refined an existing dataset of 116 ATD-related Jira issues from prior work, producing 57 expert-validated items used to extract representative keywords. These were applied to identify over 103,000 candidate issues across ten open-source projects. To assess the reliability of this keyword-based filtering, we conducted a qualitative evaluation of a statistically representative sample of labeled issues. Building on this filtered dataset, we applied active learning with multiple query strategies to prioritize the most informative samples for annotation. Our results show that the Breaking Ties strategy consistently improves model performance, achieving the highest F1-score of 0.72 while reducing the annotation effort by 49\%. In order to enhance model transparency, we applied SHAP and LIME to explain the outcomes of automated ATD classification. Expert evaluation revealed that both LIME and SHAP provided reasonable explanations, with the usefulness of the explanations often depending on the relevance of the highlighted features. Notably, experts preferred LIME overall for its clarity and ease of use.
title_zh: 通过主动学习与可解释人工智能减少架构技术债检测中的标注工作量
abstract_zh: 自承认技术债（Self-Admitted Technical Debt, SATD）是指开发人员在自然语言文档（如代码注释、提交信息和问题追踪系统）中明确承认的技术折衷。在各类SATD中，架构技术债（Architecture Technical Debt, ATD）因其抽象性和高度依赖上下文的特性，尤其难以检测。手动标注ATD成本高、耗时长，且难以扩展。本研究旨在通过结合基于关键词的过滤、主动学习与可解释人工智能（Explainable AI），降低ATD检测中的标注工作量。我们对先前研究中已有的116个与ATD相关的Jira问题数据集进行了优化，从中提取出57个经专家验证的代表性条目，并据此提炼出关键特征词。这些关键词被应用于十个开源项目中，识别出超过10.3万个候选问题。为评估该关键词过滤方法的可靠性，我们对具有统计代表性的标注问题样本进行了定性评估。基于筛选后的数据集，我们采用多种主动学习查询策略，优先选择最具信息量的样本进行人工标注。实验结果表明，采用“打破平局”（Breaking Ties）策略能持续提升模型性能，最终达到0.72的最高F1分数，同时将标注工作量减少了49%。为进一步提升模型的可解释性，我们应用SHAP和LIME方法对自动化ATD分类结果进行解释。专家评估显示，LIME与SHAP均能提供合理且有意义的解释，其解释的有效性通常取决于所突出特征的相关性。值得注意的是，专家整体更偏好LIME，因其解释更清晰、使用更简便。

title: MuxTune: Efficient Multi-Task LLM Fine-Tuning in Multi-Tenant Datacenters via Spatial-Temporal Backbone Multiplexing
authors: Chunyu Xue, Yi Pan, Weihao Cui, Quan Chen, Shulai Zhang, Bingsheng He, Minyi Guo
abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) is widely applied as the backend of fine-tuning APIs for large language model (LLM) customization in datacenters. Service providers deploy separate instances for individual PEFT tasks, giving rise to prominent resource inefficiencies, including (1) GPU underutilization from small-scale, PEFT-native operators and (2) device stalls from communication delays and data dependencies in parallelized execution. To address these issues, this paper presents MuxTune, a fine-tuning system that enables resource-efficient concurrent execution of multiple PEFT tasks. The key idea is to multiplex the backbone across independent tasks in a spatial-temporal manner for improved utilization and reduced stalls. Building on flexible, modularized backbone sharing via unified PEFT representations, MuxTune proposes hierarchical co-scheduling scheme with task, operator, and data-level optimizations. Specifically, it fuses tasks through a hybrid of spatial and temporal multiplexing, and orchestrates multi-task operator execution in two-tiered hybrid parallelism. Additionally, MuxTune employs chunk-based data alignment to mitigate inter-task ineffective tokens. Experimental results demonstrate that MuxTune achieves up to $2.33\times$ higher throughput and $5.29\times$ memory reduction compared to three state-of-the-art baselines.
title_zh: MuxTune：通过时空骨干多路复用实现多租户数据中心中的高效多任务大模型微调
abstract_zh: 参数高效微调（PEFT）被广泛用作数据中心中大型语言模型（LLM）定制化微调API的后端技术。服务提供商通常为每个PEFT任务部署独立的实例，导致显著的资源浪费，主要包括：（1）由于小规模、原生PEFT操作符造成的GPU利用率低下；（2）并行执行过程中因通信延迟和数据依赖引发的设备停顿。为解决上述问题，本文提出MuxTune，一种支持多PEFT任务资源高效并发执行的微调系统。其核心思想是通过时空联合复用骨干网络，在不同任务间实现更优的资源利用率并减少停顿。基于统一的PEFT表示实现灵活、模块化的骨干网络共享，MuxTune设计了分层协同调度机制，涵盖任务、操作符和数据三个层面的优化。具体而言，系统通过空间与时间复用相结合的方式融合多个任务，并在两级混合并行架构下协调多任务操作符的执行。此外，MuxTune采用基于数据块的对齐策略，有效缓解了任务间无效token带来的资源浪费。实验结果表明，与三种最先进的基线方法相比，MuxTune在吞吐量上最高提升2.33倍，内存占用减少达5.29倍。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Artificial Intelligence: A Task-Directed Survey in the Black-Box Models Era
authors: Giovanni Pio Delvecchio, Lorenzo Molfetta, Gianluca Moro
abstract: The integration of symbolic computing with neural networks has intrigued researchers since the first theorizations of Artificial intelligence (AI). The ability of Neuro-Symbolic (NeSy) methods to infer or exploit behavioral schema has been widely considered as one of the possible proxies for human-level intelligence. However, the limited semantic generalizability and the challenges in declining complex domains with pre-defined patterns and rules hinder their practical implementation in real-world scenarios. The unprecedented results achieved by connectionist systems since the last AI breakthrough in 2017 have raised questions about the competitiveness of NeSy solutions, with particular emphasis on the Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision fields. This survey examines task-specific advancements in the NeSy domain to explore how incorporating symbolic systems can enhance explainability and reasoning capabilities. Our findings are meant to serve as a resource for researchers exploring explainable NeSy methodologies for real-life tasks and applications. Reproducibility details and in-depth comments on each surveyed research work are made available at https://github.com/disi-unibo-nlp/task-oriented-neuro-symbolic.git.
title_zh: 神经符号人工智能：黑箱模型时代下的任务导向综述
abstract_zh: 自人工智能（AI）最初理论化以来，符号计算与神经网络的融合便一直吸引着研究人员的关注。神经符号（NeSy）方法能够推断或利用行为模式的能力，被广泛认为是人类级智能的一种可能代理。然而，其语义泛化能力有限，且在处理具有预定义模式和规则的复杂领域时面临诸多挑战，这限制了其在现实世界场景中的实际应用。自2017年上一次AI突破以来，连接主义系统取得了前所未有的成果，这引发了人们对NeSy解决方案竞争力的质疑，尤其是在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域。本综述聚焦于NeSy领域的任务特定进展，探讨如何通过整合符号系统来提升可解释性与推理能力。我们的研究发现旨在为探索真实任务与应用中可解释NeSy方法的研究人员提供参考资源。每项被调研研究的可复现性细节及深入评述已发布于 https://github.com/disi-unibo-nlp/task-oriented-neuro-symbolic.git。

title: RippleGUItester: Change-Aware Exploratory Testing
authors: Yanqi Su, Michael Pradel, Chunyang Chen
abstract: Software systems evolve continuously through frequent code changes, yet such changes often introduce unintended bugs despite extensive testing and code review. Existing testing approaches are largely constrained to predefined execution paths or rely on unguided exploration, leaving many change-induced issues undetected. To address this challenge, we present RippleGUItester, a change-driven testing system that treats a code change as the epicenter of a ripple effect and explores its broader, user-visible impacts via the GUI. Given a code change, RippleGUItester performs LLM-based change-impact analysis to generate and enrich realistic test scenarios, executes these scenarios on both pre-change and post-change versions of the system, and applies differential analysis to identify behavioral differences. Crucially, RippleGUItester employs multimodal bug detection, comparing visual GUI changes and interpreting them in the context of natural-language change intents to distinguish unintended bugs from intended behavioral updates. We evaluate our approach on hundreds of real-world code changes across four widely used software systems: Firefox, Zettlr, JabRef, and Godot. Our results show that the proposed approach uncovers bugs introduced by code changes that were missed by existing test suites, CI pipelines, and code review. In total, we identify 26 previously unknown bugs that still exist in the latest versions of the evaluated systems. After reporting, 16 bugs have been fixed, 2 have been confirmed, 6 are still under discussion, and 2 were marked as intended. We envision RippleGUItester being applied before or shortly after a code change is merged, enabling earlier detection of regressions.
title_zh: RippleGUItester：感知变更的探索性测试
abstract_zh: 软件系统通过频繁的代码变更持续演进，但即便经过充分的测试和代码审查，这些变更仍常常引入意料之外的缺陷。现有的测试方法大多局限于预定义的执行路径，或依赖无引导的探索，导致许多由变更引发的问题未能被发现。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了RippleGUItester——一种以代码变更为核心的驱动型测试系统。该系统将代码变更视为“涟漪效应”的中心，通过图形用户界面（GUI）探索其更广泛、用户可见的影响。给定一个代码变更，RippleGUItester利用大语言模型（LLM）进行变更影响分析，生成并丰富真实可信的测试场景；在变更前后的系统版本上执行这些场景，并通过差异分析识别行为上的变化。关键的是，RippleGUItester采用多模态缺陷检测机制，对比视觉上的GUI变化，并结合自然语言描述的变更意图进行语境化解读，从而有效区分无意引入的缺陷与预期的行为更新。我们在四个广泛应用的软件系统——Firefox、Zettlr、JabRef和Godot——中对数百个真实代码变更进行了评估。结果表明，该方法能够发现现有测试套件、持续集成（CI）流水线以及代码审查所遗漏的由代码变更引入的缺陷。总共识别出26个此前未知的缺陷，这些缺陷在当前最新版本中依然存在。报告后，已有16个缺陷被修复，2个被确认，6个仍在讨论中，另有2个被判定为预期行为。我们设想RippleGUItester可在代码变更合并前或合并后不久投入使用，从而实现对回归问题的更早发现。

title: PRISM: Pushing the Frontier of Deep Think via Process Reward Model-Guided Inference
authors: Rituraj Sharma, Weiyuan Chen, Noah Provenzano, Tu Vu
abstract: DEEPTHINK methods improve reasoning by generating, refining, and aggregating populations of candidate solutions, which enables strong performance on complex mathematical and scientific tasks. However, existing frameworks often lack reliable correctness signals during inference, which creates a population-enhancement bottleneck where deeper deliberation amplifies errors, suppresses correct minority solutions, and yields weak returns to additional compute. In this paper, we introduce a functional decomposition of DEEPTHINK systems and propose PRISM, a Process Reward Model (PRM)-guided inference algorithm that uses step-level verification to guide both population refinement and solution aggregation. During refinement, PRISM treats candidate solutions as particles in a PRM-defined energy landscape and reshapes the population through score-guided resampling and stochastic refinement, which concentrates probability mass on higher-quality reasoning while preserving diversity. Across mathematics and science benchmarks, PRISM is competitive with or outperforms existing DEEPTHINK methods, reaching 90.0%, 75.4%, and 71.4% with gpt-oss-20b on AIME25, HMMT25, and GPQA Diamond, respectively, while matching or exceeding gpt-oss-120b. Additionally, our analysis shows that PRISM produces consistent net-directional correction during refinement, remains reliable when the initial population contains few correct candidates, and often lies on the compute-accuracy Pareto frontier.
title_zh: PRISM：通过过程奖励模型引导的推理推动深度思考的前沿
abstract_zh: DEEPTHINK 方法通过生成、优化和聚合候选解的种群，提升了推理能力，使其在复杂的数学与科学任务中表现出色。然而，现有框架在推理过程中往往缺乏可靠的正确性信号，导致“种群增强瓶颈”：更深入的思考反而放大了错误，压制了少数正确的解，使得额外计算资源带来的收益微弱。本文提出了一种 DEEPTHINK 系统的功能分解，并引入 PRISM——一种由过程奖励模型（Process Reward Model, PRM）引导的推理算法。PRISM 利用步骤级验证机制，同时指导种群的优化与解的聚合。在优化阶段，PRISM 将候选解视为位于 PRM 定义的能量场中的粒子，通过基于得分的重采样与随机优化，重塑种群结构，使概率质量集中于高质量推理路径，同时保持多样性。在数学与科学基准测试中，PRISM 的表现与现有 DEEPTHINK 方法相当或更优：在 AIME25、HMMT25 和 GPQA Diamond 上，使用 gpt-oss-20b 模型分别达到 90.0%、75.4% 和 71.4% 的准确率，且与 gpt-oss-120b 模型表现相当或更优。此外，我们的分析表明，PRISM 在优化过程中表现出一致的净方向性修正能力，即使初始种群中正确解极少，仍能保持可靠性，并且通常位于计算资源与准确率之间的帕累托前沿。

title: Investigation of MAC Architectures Using Various Parallel Prefix Adders
authors: Hamsavardhiny R, R Muthaiah
publish: 2025 IEEE First International Conference on Innovations in Engineering and Next-Generation Technologies for Sustainability (ICINVENTS)
abstract: This work employs the Verilog Hardware Description Language (HDL) for designing, building, and analyzing the performance of an efficient Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) unit to be used on the Xilinx Zedboard (Zynq-7000 FPGA). Enhancing digital arithmetic units' computing speed and area consumption is the fundamental objective since they are key elements of embedded systems and digital signal processing (DSP). A Vedic multiplier, as proposed by the Urdhva Tiryagbhyam Sutra, an ancient Indian mathematical theorem that is famous for its capability to calculate partial products concurrently, is integrated into the design. In comparison to traditional binary multipliers, the time for multiplication is greatly minimized. Five parallel-prefix adders-Brent-Kung, Han-Carlson, Kogge-Stone, Ladner-Fischer, and Sklansky were considered for the accumulation step to find the most efficient architecture regarding speed and hardware usage. The FPGA was employed to synthesize and validate every MAC configuration. Studies were performed on performance metrics such as resource utilization (LUTs and slice registers), logic delay, net delay, and overall delay. While Brent-Kung realized low resource utilization with a slight compromise in performance, the Ladner-Fischer-based MAC unit stood out with the shortest overall delay of 21.593 ns. All designs possessed static slice registers (32) and minor fluctuations in LUT usage, exhibiting minimal and regular FPGA resource usage. The results validate that scalable and efficient hardware for high-speed arithmetic operations in real-time systems can be obtained using a synthesis of Vedic multiplication with enhanced prefix adders.
title_zh: 使用各种并行前缀加法器的MAC架构研究
abstract_zh: 本研究采用Verilog硬件描述语言（HDL）设计、构建并分析了一种高效乘累加（MAC）单元，该单元专用于Xilinx Zedboard（Zynq-7000 FPGA）平台。提升数字算术单元的运算速度与面积消耗是本研究的核心目标，因为这些单元是嵌入式系统和数字信号处理（DSP）中的关键组成部分。设计中引入了基于古代印度数学定理——乌尔达瓦·蒂里亚格布亚姆（Urdhva Tiryagbhyam）乘法法则的维迪亚（Vedic）乘法器，该方法以其能够并行计算部分积而著称，显著缩短了乘法运算时间。在累加阶段，比较了五种并行前缀加法器——Brent-Kung、Han-Carlson、Kogge-Stone、Ladner-Fischer和Sklansky，以确定在速度与硬件资源使用方面最高效的架构。所有MAC配置均通过FPGA进行综合与验证。研究评估了包括资源利用率（LUTs和切片寄存器）、逻辑延迟、网络延迟及总体延迟在内的多项性能指标。尽管Brent-Kung加法器在资源利用方面表现优异，仅略有性能牺牲，但基于Ladner-Fischer加法器的MAC单元在整体延迟方面表现最佳，达到21.593纳秒。所有设计方案均采用32个静态切片寄存器，LUT使用量波动极小，展现出稳定且规律的FPGA资源占用特性。研究结果表明，通过将维迪亚乘法与优化的前缀加法器相结合，可实现可扩展且高效的硬件结构，适用于实时系统中的高速算术运算。

title: Design of Self-Checking Discrete Devices Based on Boolean Signals Correction and Composition of Constant-Weight Codes “1-out-of-4” and “3-out-of-4”
authors: Dmitry V. Efanov, Yeseniya I. Yelina, Sunnatillo T. Boltayev, Nazirjan M. Aripov, Asadulla R. Azizov, Elnara K. Ametova, Sokhibjamol I. Valiev
abstract: In the design of self-checking discrete devices, the main tasks are to achieve the smallest structural redundancy of the concurrent error-detection circuits and to ensure the checkability of all their components. Practice shows that it is not always possible to achieve this using traditional methods of designing concurrent error-detection circuits, based on duplication and control of calculations using code methods. The authors of the paper propose a method for modifying constant-weight codes, which allows achieving special properties of the designed structures of self-checking devices. In the course of our research, we used methods of discrete mathematics and technical diagnostics for the development and justification of new approaches to designing self-checking discrete devices. We have proposed methods for designing concurrent error-detection circuits based on Boolean signals correction and the composition of constant-weight codes “1-out-of-4” and “3-out-of-4”. These methods allow designing a large number of concurrent error-detection circuits, among which the most effective ones in terms of structural redundancy can be selected. In addition, by minimizing the number of signal correction elements in the concurrent error-detection circuit, the solution to the problem of ensuring complete self-checking of the concurrent error-detection circuit structures is simplified. Experimental results confirm the theoretical prerequisites for improving the methods of organizing concurrent error-detection circuits based on the methods proposed by the authors of the paper. Our proposed solutions can be effectively used in practice in the design of self-checking discrete devices based on any element base.
title_zh: 基于布尔信号纠错与恒重码“1选4”和“3选4”组合的自检离散器件设计
abstract_zh: 在自检离散器件的设计中，主要任务是实现并发错误检测电路的最小结构冗余，并确保其所有组件均可被检测。实践表明，仅依靠传统的基于复制和编码方法控制计算的并发错误检测电路设计方法，并不能总是达到这一目标。本文作者提出了一种修改恒权码的方法，使得所设计的自检器件结构具备特殊性能。在研究过程中，我们运用了离散数学与技术诊断的方法，开发并论证了设计自检离散器件的新方法。我们提出了基于布尔信号纠错以及“1-out-of-4”和“3-out-of-4”恒权码组合的并发错误检测电路设计方法。这些方法能够设计出大量并发错误检测电路，从中可选择结构冗余最小、效率最高的方案。此外，通过最小化并发错误检测电路中信号纠错元件的数量，简化了实现并发错误检测电路结构完全自检的问题。实验结果验证了本文所提方法在理论上提升并发错误检测电路组织效率的可行性。所提出的解决方案在实际应用中可有效用于基于任何元器件基础的自检离散器件设计。

title: Large Language Model-Assisted Security Testing for Embedded Systems
authors: Xing Liu, Jian Lin, Weiyu Dong, Zhizhuo Tang, Yonghao Wang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing, Computer Networks and Communications (SPCNC)
abstract: Fuzzing of embedded systems in a system simulation environment is currently a mainstream security testing method. To address the limitations of traditional embedded system fuzzing, such as random byte perturbation existing in traditional embedded system fuzzing technologies, this paper proposes a large language model-assisted fuzzing method. Firstly, static analysis is used to extract the semantic information of data register-related functions and decompiled code, which serve as the input basis for constructing prompts; Secondly, various types of peripheral protocols are analyzed to generate initial seeds that are more in line with the firmware input format; Finally, dynamic detection of coverage is performed, and the large language model is used to assist in generating test cases in a timely manner, helping to increase the number of paths explored by firmware execution. Experiments show that this method improves the code coverage of the tested firmware by 14.2%~52.9% and effectively enhances the generation quality of test cases.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的嵌入式系统安全测试
abstract_zh: 在系统仿真环境中对嵌入式系统进行模糊测试（fuzzing）目前已成为主流的安全测试方法。为解决传统嵌入式系统模糊测试技术存在的局限性，例如传统方法中随机字节扰动的问题，本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的辅助模糊测试方法。首先，通过静态分析提取与数据寄存器相关的函数及反编译代码中的语义信息，作为构建提示（prompt）的基础输入；其次，分析多种外设协议，生成更符合固件输入格式的初始种子；最后，结合动态覆盖率检测，利用大语言模型实时辅助生成测试用例，从而有效提升固件执行过程中探索的路径数量。实验结果表明，该方法使被测固件的代码覆盖率提升了14.2%~52.9%，显著提高了测试用例的生成质量。

title: Generative Diffusion Modelling for High Quality Wafer Image Data Augmentation, Defect Detection and Image Annotation
authors: Ravi Kumar Balija
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Emerging Electronics (ICEE)
abstract: Modern semiconductor manufacturing processes are inherently complex and require precise coordination to achieve the desired outcomes. Thousands of tools and workflows must operate in harmony across various manufacturing sectors, teams, and fabrication facilities, often spanning multiple geographic locations. This orchestration is critical for meeting business objectives, including attaining high yield rates and maximizing revenue. Additionally, effective coordination of personnel is essential to ensure operational efficiency. In Semiconductor manufacturing, achieving high yield rates is paramount for meeting year-over-year revenue targets and adapting to volatile market demands. Reducing wafer defect rates during the manufacturing process is a crucial factor in this endeavor. However, many organizations lack sufficient collections of wafer images necessary for comprehensive defect analysis and mitigation. To address the challenges, the paper presents the application of advanced deep learning techniques, specifically generative diffusion modeling. We implement diffusion models for image data augmentation, defect detection, and annotation, offering a robust solution for organizations aiming to improve wafer quality and yield through enhanced data-driven methodologies.
title_zh: 用于高质量晶圆图像数据增强、缺陷检测与图像标注的生成式扩散模型
abstract_zh: 现代半导体制造工艺 inherently具有高度复杂性，需要精确协调才能实现预期成果。成千上万的设备和流程必须在不同制造领域、团队及晶圆厂之间协同运作，这些设施往往分布在多个地理区域。这种协调对于实现商业目标至关重要，包括提高良率和最大化收入。此外，人员的有效协作也是确保运营效率的关键。在半导体制造中，实现高良率对于达成年度收入目标以及应对市场波动需求至关重要。降低制造过程中的晶圆缺陷率是实现这一目标的关键因素。然而，许多企业缺乏足够数量的晶圆图像数据，难以开展全面的缺陷分析与应对。为解决这些挑战，本文提出应用先进的深度学习技术，特别是生成式扩散模型。我们通过扩散模型实现图像数据增强、缺陷检测与标注，为致力于通过数据驱动方法提升晶圆质量与良率的企业提供了一种强有力的解决方案。

title: Buffer Overflow Fuzzing Guided by Directed Identification Metric
authors: Xiamin Guo, Mingke Zhang, Wei Zhang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing, Computer Networks and Communications (SPCNC)
abstract: Fuzzing serves as a prevalent automated approach for uncovering software vulnerabilities. However, traditional fuzzing often exhibit a lack of directional focus when applied to particular vulnerability types, leading to inefficient triggering performance and suboptimal allocation of testing resources. This paper introduces a directed identification metric guided fuzzing aimed specifically at detecting buffer overflow vulnerabilities. We add source-level instrumentation that computes a runtime identification metric and feed that information back into the fuzzing loop to bias seed selection and mutation toward code areas that appear close to unsafe memory accesses. Based on the AFL++ framework, experimental evaluations demonstrate that the proposed technique accelerates crash detection markedly compared to existing fuzzing, confirming the practicality and efficacy of the directed identification metric in enhancing fuzzing.
title_zh: 基于有向识别度量的缓冲区溢出模糊测试
abstract_zh: 模糊测试作为一种广泛使用的自动化方法，用于发现软件漏洞。然而，传统的模糊测试在针对特定类型漏洞时往往缺乏方向性，导致触发效率低下，测试资源分配也不够优化。本文提出了一种基于定向识别度量的模糊测试方法，专门用于检测缓冲区溢出漏洞。我们引入了源代码级别的插桩技术，以在运行时计算识别度量，并将该信息反馈至模糊测试循环中，从而引导种子选择和变异操作，聚焦于接近不安全内存访问的代码区域。基于AFL++框架的实验评估表明，与现有模糊测试方法相比，所提出的技术显著加快了崩溃检测速度，验证了该定向识别度量在提升模糊测试效果方面的实用性和有效性。

title: VulnDetective: Using LLM Agents to Analyze Common Weaknesses and Identify Smart Contract Vulnerabilities
authors: Thanmai Mandala, Cora Zeger, Tessa E. Andersen, Gaby G. Dagher, Jun Zhuang
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications (TPS-ISA)
abstract: Blockchain technology is a promising innovation to store information online while being secure and transparent at the same time. Despite the benefits, the immutable nature of blockchain makes it prone to vulnerabilities as any smart contract uploaded onto the blockchain cannot be modified later. Thus, it is imperative to design secure smart contracts during development stages and incorporate effective vulnerability detection mechanisms. Large-Language-Models (LLMs) are a propitious approach to automate vulnerability detection. However, recent attempts at using LLMs to detect vulnerabilities have resulted in high false positive rates and seem prone to obsolescence due to evolving Solidity code. Moreover, existing research often conflate weaknesses with vulnerabilities, despite their apparent differences, and all prior works only focus on vulnerability detection based on broad categories rather than their exact vulnerability identifiers (VIDs). To address these gaps, we propose a novel framework, VulnDetective, of fine-tuned LLM agents and a CWE-VID database to map weaknesses to their corresponding vulnerability, thereby increasing detection accuracy. Our findings show that pre-trained base models struggle significantly with detecting exact vulnerabilities, while VulnDetective shows significant improvement over base models.
title_zh: VulnDetective：利用大语言模型智能体分析常见缺陷并识别智能合约漏洞
abstract_zh: 区块链技术是一种极具前景的创新，能够在保障安全的同时实现信息的透明存储。尽管具有诸多优势，但区块链的不可篡改特性也使其容易产生漏洞——一旦智能合约被上传至区块链，便无法再进行修改。因此，在开发阶段设计安全的智能合约，并引入有效的漏洞检测机制至关重要。大型语言模型（LLMs）为自动化漏洞检测提供了一条有前景的路径。然而，近期利用LLMs进行漏洞检测的尝试普遍存在误报率高、且因Solidity代码不断演进而容易过时的问题。此外，现有研究常常将“弱点”与“漏洞”混为一谈，尽管二者存在明显差异；同时，以往工作仅基于宽泛的漏洞类别进行检测，而未针对具体的漏洞标识符（VID）。为弥补这些不足，我们提出了一种新型框架VulnDetective，该框架结合微调后的LLM智能体与CWE-VID数据库，能够将弱点精准映射到对应的漏洞，从而显著提升检测准确率。研究结果表明，预训练的基础模型在识别具体漏洞方面表现不佳，而VulnDetective在检测精度上相较基线模型有显著提升。

title: EDL: Efficient Data-Oblivious Loops
authors: Biniyam Tiruye, Lauren Biernacki, Todd Austin
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications (TPS-ISA)
abstract: Data-oblivious programs are essential solutions for maintaining privacy in computation, crucial amidst rising concerns regarding privacy breaches and data misuse. These programs safeguard sensitive information in today's data-driven landscape. However, their limited practicality due to massive performance overheads poses an obstacle to their widespread adoption. Resolving these inefficiencies not only ensures the viability of data oblivious techniques but also fosters trust in privacy-preserving technologies. Previous work showed that one of the contributors to these significant overheads is loop conversion techniques. Principles of data-oblivious programming demand that decision-making should not depend on sensitive data in order to maintain obliviousness. Due to this requirement, data-oblivious programs are stripped of any heuristics that could terminate loops early, thereby forcing loops to always execute the worst-case number of times. In response to these challenges, this paper introduces an innovative approach, termed Efficient Data Oblivious Loop (EDL), aimed at reducing the impact of loops in data-oblivious program performance while maintaining complete obliviousness. EDL presents a technique that lowers the trip count of these loops by leveraging information derived from safely profiling the algorithms. The algorithm profiling is used to determine the most common trip count of a particular loop across many non-data-oblivious executions of the program, this information is in turn used to determine a new upper bound for the data-oblivious version of the program. This ensures most executions of the algorithm will produce correct results even with the new lowered trip count. For the minority of executions that fail to produce correct results due to a higher trip count than the new trip count, EDL can detect the inputs and prompt a rerun of these executions with a higher trip count. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach, with EDL yielding an average speedup of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.0 \times$</tex>, and up to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$4.5 \times$</tex>. While this approach does not work for all algorithms, it resulted in a significant enhancement in the efficiency of many data-oblivious programs. This paper describes this technique in detail and provides a guideline to identify programs that could benefit from this optimization.
title_zh: EDL：高效数据无关循环
abstract_zh:
数据无关程序是维护计算过程中隐私安全的关键解决方案，在隐私泄露和数据滥用问题日益严重的背景下尤为重要。这类程序在当今数据驱动的环境中有效保护敏感信息。然而，由于其存在巨大的性能开销，实际应用受限，这成为其广泛采用的主要障碍。解决这些效率问题不仅能够确保数据无关技术的可行性，还能增强人们对隐私保护技术的信任。

以往的研究表明，导致这些显著性能开销的一个重要因素是循环转换技术。数据无关编程的基本原则要求决策过程不能依赖于敏感数据，以确保程序的“无关性”。由于这一要求，数据无关程序无法使用任何能够提前终止循环的启发式方法，从而迫使所有循环都必须执行最坏情况下的迭代次数。

针对上述挑战，本文提出了一种创新方法，称为高效数据无关循环（Efficient Data Oblivious Loop, EDL），旨在降低循环对数据无关程序性能的影响，同时保持完全的数据无关性。EDL通过利用从安全算法分析中获得的信息，降低循环的迭代次数。具体而言，该方法首先对算法进行安全的性能分析，统计在多个非数据无关执行中某一循环的最常见迭代次数。基于这一统计信息，为数据无关版本的程序设定一个新的、更低的迭代上限。该新上限确保绝大多数程序执行仍能产生正确结果。对于少数因实际迭代次数超过新上限而导致结果错误的执行，EDL能够识别出此类输入，并提示重新运行这些执行，采用更高的迭代次数。

实验结果表明，该方法具有显著效果：EDL平均提升了2.0倍的执行速度，最高可达4.5倍。尽管该方法并非适用于所有算法，但对许多数据无关程序而言，其效率得到了显著提升。本文详细阐述了该技术的实现机制，并提供了识别哪些程序可从该优化中受益的指导原则。

title:
MADiC: A 3nm 7.4TOPS/mm
                    <sup>2</sup>
                    , 17.4TOPS/W Generative Diffusion Accelerator Enabled by Hardware-Compiler Co-Optimization of Memory Hierarchy and Operator Parallelism
authors: Shih-Wei Hsieh, Yi-Syuan Chen, Ping-Yuan Tsai, Ming-Hung Lin, Chia-Yuan Cheng, Lien-Feng Hsu, Po-Hao Huang, Hung-Wei Chih, Po-Han Chiang, Chia-Ming Chang, Ming-Hsuan Chiang, Chia-Hung Yuan, Sheng-Po Kuo, Viswanath Uggu, Chun-Kun Chan, Ming-En David Shih, Yu-Cheng Tseng, Hsin-Ping Cheng, Stan Huang, Chia-Ping Chen, ShenKai Chang, Chih-Ming Wang, Po-Yu Yeh, Jett Liu, Yung-Chang Chang, Chi-Cheng Ju, Yucheun Kevin Jou
abstract: This work presents MADiC, a 3nm 0.338mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> diffusion accelerator for generative image editing on edge devices. MADiC features design-time L1/L2 memory optimization, cross-loop feature map allocation with write-over-read relaxation, and activation-aware input preloading with concurrent resizing. Operating at 0.575V and 546MHz, it delivers 7.4TOPS/mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> and 17.4TOPS/W when running the Diffusion ConvNet model.
title_zh: MADiC：一种基于内存层次结构与算子并行性软硬件协同优化的3nm 7.4TOPS/mm²、17.4TOPS/W生成式扩散加速器
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种面向边缘设备生成式图像编辑的3nm 0.338mm²扩散加速器MADiC。MADiC具备设计阶段的L1/L2内存优化、跨循环特征图分配并支持写后读松弛，以及激活感知的输入预加载与并发缩放功能。在0.575V电压和546MHz频率下运行Diffusion ConvNet模型时，其能效达到7.4TOPS/mm²和17.4TOPS/W。

title: NLP-Powered Test Case Generation from Function Description – A Cross-Language Approach
authors: Jonah Varghese Kachirackal, Vijayakumar Balakrishnan
publish: 2025 3rd International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Network Systems (CINS)
abstract: This paper presents a practical framework for building an AI-Based Automated Test Case Generator capable of handling multiple programming languages including Python, JavaScript and Rust. Traditional test case generation methods are limited by manual effort, language constraints, and poor adaptability to real-world codebases. To address this, our system leverages a fine-tuned transformer model (StarCoderBase-1B) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), guided by structured inputs.We incorporate both Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) and Control Flow Graphs (CFGs) to enhance the model’s syntactic and semantic reasoning capabilities. ASTs represent code structure, while CFGs allow understanding of control logic, loops, and branching. Test quality is further optimized through reinforcement learning and mutation testing techniques, ensuring fault detection and coverage improvements.Training is performed using datasets such as The Stack, HumanEval, and CodeNet, reformatted into structured JSONL entries with aligned code, control graphs, and test cases. We conclude by highlighting current limitations, including zero-shot generalization and dynamic input handling, and suggest directions for future work in AI-powered quality assurance.
title_zh: 基于自然语言处理的函数描述测试用例生成——一种跨语言方法
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种实用的框架，用于构建一个基于人工智能的自动化测试用例生成系统，该系统能够处理包括Python、JavaScript和Rust在内的多种编程语言。传统的测试用例生成方法受限于人工投入、语言限制以及对真实代码库适应性差等问题。为解决这些问题，我们的系统采用经过微调的Transformer模型（StarCoderBase-1B），结合低秩适应（LoRA）技术，并通过结构化输入进行引导。我们引入了抽象语法树（AST）和控制流图（CFG），以增强模型的语法与语义推理能力：AST用于表示代码结构，而CFG则有助于理解控制逻辑、循环和分支结构。通过强化学习与变异测试技术，进一步优化测试质量，确保缺陷检测能力与代码覆盖率的提升。训练数据来自The Stack、HumanEval和CodeNet等数据集，经过重新格式化为包含对齐代码、控制图和测试用例的结构化JSONL条目。最后，本文指出了当前存在的局限性，如零样本泛化能力不足和动态输入处理困难，并对未来在人工智能驱动的质量保障方向提出了研究建议。

title: Knowledge Assistant for Joint Utility: A Multi-Agent LLM-Driven Conversational System for Automated Task Execution
authors: Krish Gopani, Shruti Shah, Abhay Mathur, Naman Lakhani, Nilesh Rathod, Aruna Gawade
publish: 2025 3rd International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Network Systems (CINS)
abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into developer workflows has redefined automation, yet most systems remain limited to executing direct terminal commands. A critical limitation in existing tools is the lack of adaptive AI systems that cater to both technical and non-technical users. Knowledge Assistant for Joint Utility advances this capability by enabling not only command execution but also intelligent explanation, code comprehension, and handling of complex, context-dependent tasks through file analysis. The system functions as a fully embedded LLM within the terminal environment. This assistant introduces a modular, agent-based architecture that supports debugging, screen processing, code editing, web-assisted installations, and dynamic project integration through a FastAPI backend and Java-based graphical interface. The system’s core innovation is its autonomous self-customization engine, where the Builder Agent interprets natural language requests to generate, implement, and integrate new functionalities into the assistant’s own codebase, allowing the system to dynamically evolve. Specialized agents—including Scraper, LLM, Builder, and Assistant—coordinate to deliver iterative, context-aware development and intelligent task handling. Evaluation across 124 installations yielded a Task Success Rate of 88.75% using GPT-4o and a Completion Rate of 93.45%, outperforming other LLMs such as Gemini and DeepSeek. These results highlight the system’s potential as a multi-agent computational framework that integrates conversational interaction with autonomous software engineering.
title_zh: 联合公用知识助手：一种基于多智能体大语言模型驱动的对话式自动化任务执行系统
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）融入开发工作流已重新定义了自动化范式，然而目前大多数系统仍局限于直接执行终端命令。现有工具的一个关键局限在于缺乏能够同时满足技术与非技术用户需求的自适应AI系统。知识助手联合实用工具（Knowledge Assistant for Joint Utility）在此基础上实现了突破，不仅支持命令执行，还具备智能解释、代码理解以及通过文件分析处理复杂、上下文依赖性任务的能力。该系统作为完全嵌入终端环境的LLM运行，引入了一种模块化、基于代理（agent-based）的架构，支持调试、屏幕处理、代码编辑、基于网络辅助的安装以及通过FastAPI后端和基于Java的图形界面实现的动态项目集成。其核心创新在于自主自定制引擎：构建代理（Builder Agent）能够解析自然语言请求，自动生成、实施并集成新功能到助手自身的代码库中，使系统具备动态演进能力。专门设计的代理——包括爬虫代理（Scraper）、LLM代理、构建代理（Builder）和助手代理（Assistant）——协同工作，实现迭代式、上下文感知的开发与智能任务处理。在124次安装中的评估结果显示，使用GPT-4o时任务成功率达到88.75%，完成率达到93.45%，显著优于其他LLM如Gemini和DeepSeek。这些成果凸显了该系统作为多代理计算框架的巨大潜力，能够将对话式交互与自主软件工程深度融合。

title: Adversarial SQLi Detection Using Character-Level CNN and Reinforcement Learning
authors: Fucai Yu, Xusheng Li, Yang Wu, Ziqiang Chang, Gaolei Fei, Xuemeng Zhai
publish: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
abstract: Adversarial SQL injection (SQLi) refers to the process in which attackers dynamically modify their attack strategies based on feedback from the target Web Application Firewall (WAF) in an attempt to bypass it. The emergence of automated adversarial SQLi tools in recent years, such as AdvSQLi, RAT, and GPTFuzzer, demonstrates that adversarial SQLi has become a critical method for vulnerability detection and SQLi execution. These tools' intelligent nature poses a significant threat to existing SQLi defense mechanisms. Payloads subjected to adversarial mutation can effectively deceive machine learning-based WAFs, while rule-based WAFs are more susceptible to having vulnerabilities discovered. To address this issue, we propose a hybrid model based on enhanced Character-Level CNN (CLCNN) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), which detects malicious patterns through multi-scale feature extraction by CLCNN from a pattern-matching perspective. Additionally, the reinforcement learning module is employed for adversarial training, executing de-obfuscation operations on payloads for which the CLCNN outputs a low confidence level, further processing ambiguous payloads. The experimental results indicate that even without a priori knowledge, CLCNN demonstrates strong resistance to such tools. And the RL module can further enhance Recall through adversarial training, with minimal reduction in the hybrid model's performance on standard SQLi datasets.
title_zh: 基于字符级CNN与强化学习的对抗性SQL注入检测
abstract_zh: 对抗性SQL注入（SQLi）是指攻击者根据目标Web应用防火墙（WAF）的反馈，动态调整其攻击策略，以尝试绕过WAF防护的过程。近年来，随着AdvSQLi、RAT和GPTFuzzer等自动化对抗性SQLi工具的出现，表明对抗性SQL注入已成为漏洞检测与SQL注入执行的关键手段。这些工具的智能化特性对现有的SQLi防御机制构成了严重威胁：经过对抗性变异的攻击载荷能够有效欺骗基于机器学习的WAF，而基于规则的WAF则更容易被发现漏洞。为应对这一挑战，本文提出一种基于增强型字符级卷积神经网络（CLCNN）与强化学习（RL）的混合模型。该模型从模式匹配的角度出发，通过CLCNN实现多尺度特征提取，以检测恶意模式；同时引入强化学习模块进行对抗性训练，对CLCNN输出置信度较低的载荷执行去混淆操作，进一步处理模糊或可疑的请求。实验结果表明，即使在缺乏先验知识的情况下，CLCNN仍表现出较强的抗对抗性工具能力；而强化学习模块通过对抗性训练可进一步提升召回率，同时对模型在标准SQLi数据集上的性能影响极小。

title: Research and Engineering Implementation of Electronic Product Testing Method Based on State Machine Model
authors: Yi Du, Yutong Zhao, Yani Zhang
publish: 2025 7th International Conference on Intelligent Control, Measurement and Signal Processing (ICMSP)
abstract: Building upon the current state of development in testing technologies globally and relevant domestic engineering applications, this paper leverages Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) theory and synthesizes relevant technologies and standards. Focusing on the application scenario of universal testing for electronic products, it conducts research and engineering implementation of State Machine Model-Based testing for Units Under Test (UUTs). Following the MBSE methodology, the process is as follows: Firstly, requirements for the entire testing process are captured, considering the simulation needs for usage scenarios and environmental characteristics. This involves collecting requirements for simulating the UUT's full range of static/dynamic environments and related general quality attributes (e.g., reliability, maintainability) during testing. Secondly, modeling software based on the state machine model is developed, enabling test modeling and test case generation according to the captured requirements. Finally, test case execution is performed. By constructing a universal, integrated software-hardware testing platform, test cases are executed, enabling the identification, processing, and management of process data and result data from the model-based testing. Ultimately, this approach achieves practical enhancement in testing capabilities, ensuring test traceability, controllable testing processes, and reliable test results.
title_zh: 基于状态机模型的电子产品测试方法研究与工程实现
abstract_zh: 在充分借鉴全球测试技术发展现状及国内相关工程应用的基础上，本文基于模型化系统工程（MBSE）理论，融合相关技术与标准，聚焦电子产品的通用测试应用场景，开展面向被测单元（UUT）的状态机模型化测试研究与工程实现。遵循MBSE方法论，具体流程如下：首先，全面捕获测试全过程的需求，充分考虑使用场景与环境特征的仿真需求，收集被测单元在全范围静态/动态环境下的仿真需求，以及测试过程中相关的通用质量属性（如可靠性、可维护性）要求；其次，基于状态机模型开发测试建模软件，依据所捕获的需求实现测试建模与测试用例的自动生成；最后，执行测试用例。通过构建一个通用、一体化的软硬件测试平台，实现测试用例的执行，并完成对模型化测试过程中产生的过程数据与结果数据的识别、处理与管理。最终，该方法显著提升了测试能力，实现了测试过程的可追溯性、可控性以及测试结果的可靠性。

title: GenAI-Powered Autonomous Test Automation for Mission-Critical Online Booking Systems: A Scalable and Monetizable Framework for Adaptive Quality Assurance
authors: Durga Krishnamoorthy, Ram Ghadiyaram, Laxminarayana Goud Hthalli Rama
publish: 2025 First International Conference of Advances in Engineering and Computing Technologies for Sustainable Development (AECTSD)
abstract: This paper introduces a novel Generative AI (GenAI)-powered framework for autonomous test automation tailored to mission-critical airline online booking software systems. By leveraging Natural Language Processing (NLP) for codeless test creation, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) for adaptive test case generation, and predictive analytics for defect detection, the framework addresses complex airline workflows, frequent updates, and regulatory compliance. Empirical evaluation across aviation case studies demonstrates a 60% improvement in test coverage, 45% reduction in testing time, and 30% increase in defect detection. The paper propose an Airline Workflow Adaptability Score (AWAS) to quantify performance and introduce strategies for growth (e.g., adoption by airlines and vendors) and monetization (e.g., SaaS models, API services). Ethical AI testing mitigates biases in passenger-facing algorithms, ensuring fairness. This scalable, monetizable framework transforms quality assurance in airline ecosystems, enabling rapid, reliable, and sustainable software validation.
title_zh: 基于生成式人工智能的自主测试自动化在关键任务在线预订系统中的应用：一种可扩展且可盈利的自适应质量保障框架
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于生成式人工智能（GenAI）的新型框架，专为关键任务型航空公司在线预订软件系统设计，实现自主测试自动化。该框架通过自然语言处理（NLP）实现无代码测试创建，利用深度强化学习（DRL）进行自适应测试用例生成，并结合预测分析技术实现缺陷检测，有效应对航空业复杂的业务流程、频繁的系统更新以及严格的合规要求。在航空领域多个案例研究中的实证评估表明，该框架使测试覆盖率提升了60%，测试时间减少45%，缺陷检出率提高30%。本文还提出了“航空公司工作流适应性评分”（AWAS），用于量化系统性能，并提出了促进发展的策略（如航空公司与供应商的采纳）及商业化路径（如SaaS模式、API服务）。通过伦理化AI测试，可有效缓解面向乘客算法中的偏见，保障公平性。该可扩展、可商业化框架将彻底变革航空生态系统中的质量保障体系，实现快速、可靠且可持续的软件验证。

title: Design Automation Systems for Rapid Single Flux Quantum Logic
authors: Shucheng Yang, Jie Ren, Xiaoping Gao, Yuntian Gao, Yuxiang Lin, Muen Wang, Wenbo Zhao
abstract: We present JSIC(Josephson-junction-based Superconductor Integrated Circuits)-EDA, a specialized EDA suite for superconducting digital integrated circuits, developed based on validated cell libraries of different processes including SIMIT-Nb03, SIMIT-Nb03P, and SIMIT-Nb04. The system integrates 3D superconductor process models, digital PDKs, and advanced timing, logic, and physical models, enabling full automation for digital design on these processes. JSIC-EDA supports seamless tool integration and automated workflow scheduling. The JSICcompiler platform provides an RTL-to GDSII synthesis flow for RSFQ circuits, featuring logic synthesis, placement, clock tree synthesis, and JTL/PTL routing for 3D processes. A developer tool, JSIClibrary, is built upon this foundation to facilitate custom cell library design. JSICsim supports RCSJ and RCLSJ junction models with large-scale parallel simulation, serving as the analog engine for tools like JSICpower, which performs power grid modeling, dynamic current analysis, and magnetic/flux analysis. JSICtime offers static, dynamic, and Monte-Carlo timing analysis for RSFQ logic, supporting both design verification and post-fabrication testing. JSICvision enables automated testing and response analysis, validated on fabricated superconducting chips. Built on a scalable framework, JSIC-EDA is actively expanding with new algorithmic modules to advance automation in superconducting IC design, analysis, and testing.
title_zh: 用于快速单磁通量子逻辑的自动化设计系统
abstract_zh:
我们提出了JSIC（基于约瑟夫森结的超导集成电路）EDA，这是一个专为超导数字集成电路设计的EDA工具套件，基于经过验证的多种工艺节点的单元库（包括SIMIT-Nb03、SIMIT-Nb03P和SIMIT-Nb04）开发而成。该系统集成了三维超导工艺模型、数字PDK（工艺设计套件）以及先进的时序、逻辑与物理模型，实现了对这些工艺的数字设计全流程自动化。JSIC-EDA支持无缝的工具集成与自动化工作流调度。

JSICcompiler平台提供从RTL到GDSII的合成流程，专为RSFQ（快速单通量量子）电路设计，包含逻辑综合、布局布线、时钟树综合以及针对三维工艺的JTL/PTL布线功能。在此基础上构建的开发者工具JSIClibrary，可辅助用户进行自定义单元库的设计。JSICsim支持RCSJ和RCLSJ约瑟夫森结模型的大规模并行仿真，作为JSICpower等工具的模拟引擎，用于电源网络建模、动态电流分析以及磁通/磁通量分析。

JSICtime提供针对RSFQ逻辑的静态、动态及蒙特卡洛时序分析，支持设计验证与流片后测试。JSICvision则实现自动化测试与响应分析，已在实际制造的超导芯片上得到验证。

基于可扩展的架构，JSIC-EDA正持续扩展新的算法模块，致力于推动超导集成电路设计、分析与测试的自动化水平不断提升。

title: FPGA-Based Implementation of LeNet Architecture in Verilog for Disease Prediction
authors: E. Dhiravidachelvi, A. Muthuvel, K.Sabitha Banu, H. Peeroli, M.Thahzeeb Fathima
publish: 2025 IEEE First International Conference on Innovations in Engineering and Next-Generation Technologies for Sustainability (ICINVENTS)
abstract: Early and accurate disease prediction through medical image analysis is a critical step in modern healthcare systems. This paper presents an FPGA-based implementation of the LeNet convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture for disease classification, designed and simulated using Verilog HDL in Xilinx Vivado. The proposed workflow begins with dataset preprocessing, where medical images are converted into. mem files using Python scripts for compatibility with hardware simulation. The LeNet model is trained in software to obtain optimized weights and biases, which are then mapped into Verilog modules to replicate the network architecture on FPGA. The system is evaluated through functional simulation to verify prediction accuracy and synthesized to analyze hardware performance metrics, including power consumption and resource utilization. Experimental results demonstrate that the hardware realization of LeNet provides efficient disease classification with reduced latency and improved energy efficiency compared to software-only implementations. This work highlights the feasibility of deploying CNN-based disease prediction models on FPGA platforms, offering a scalable and low-power solution for real-time medical diagnostics.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的Verilog实现LeNet架构用于疾病预测
abstract_zh: 通过医学图像分析实现早期且准确的疾病预测，是现代医疗系统中的关键步骤。本文提出了一种基于FPGA的LeNet卷积神经网络（CNN）架构实现方案，用于疾病分类。该方案采用Verilog HDL在Xilinx Vivado环境中进行设计与仿真。所提出的流程首先对数据集进行预处理，利用Python脚本将医学图像转换为.mem文件，以确保与硬件仿真兼容。LeNet模型在软件中完成训练，获得优化的权重和偏置参数，随后将这些参数映射至Verilog模块中，以在FPGA上复现网络架构。系统通过功能仿真验证预测准确性，并进行综合以分析硬件性能指标，包括功耗和资源利用率。实验结果表明，LeNet的硬件实现相较于纯软件方案，在疾病分类任务中表现出更低的延迟和更高的能效。本研究展示了将基于CNN的疾病预测模型部署于FPGA平台的可行性，为实时医疗诊断提供了一种可扩展、低功耗的解决方案。

title: A Hybrid AI Framework for Predictive and Prescriptive Analytics Using Gradient Boosting, Graph Neural Networks, and Transformers
authors: R. Thiyagarajan, M. Banupriya, S. Pavithra, J. Sumitha, P. Preetha, B. Arya Shree
publish: 2025 IEEE First International Conference on Innovations in Engineering and Next-Generation Technologies for Sustainability (ICINVENTS)
abstract: Contemporary organizations are increasingly adopting advanced data frameworks in creating decentralized, scalable, and secure data ecosystems. When integrated with cloud infrastructure, edge computing, and AI-driven analytics, these architectures dismantle data silos and enable real-time, insight-oriented decision- making. Leveraging state-of-the-art algorithms, including gradient boosting, graph neural networks, and transformer-based models, predictive and prescriptive analytics attain superior accuracy, adaptability, and contextual relevance.
title_zh: 基于梯度提升、图神经网络和Transformer的混合AI框架用于预测与优化分析
abstract_zh: 当代组织正越来越多地采用先进的数据框架，以构建去中心化、可扩展且安全的数据生态系统。当这些架构与云基础设施、边缘计算以及人工智能驱动的分析技术相结合时，能够打破数据孤岛，实现实时、以洞察为导向的决策。通过利用最先进的算法，包括梯度提升、图神经网络以及基于Transformer的模型，预测性与指导性分析在准确性、适应性和情境相关性方面均达到更高水平。

title: Agentic RAG for Command Generation in Automated Penetration Testing
authors: Zhengkun Chen, Chuanjun Yi, Pan Jia
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing, Computer Networks and Communications (SPCNC)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown great potential in automated penetration testing (PT), but they need to rely on external knowledge to obtain precise output in complex command generation tasks. Although the traditional retrievalaugmented generation (RAG) can supplement external evidence to alleviate the hallucination problem, its static, single-round retrieval mechanism struggles to meet the dynamic knowledge needs of PT: the initial retrieval results may not cover the knowledge gaps generated during the reasoning process. To address it, this paper proposes a Reason-in-Document framework based on Agentic RAG, which transforms a single query into multi-step dynamic retrieval reasoning. Following the ReAct paradigm, the agent identifies knowledge gaps in the reasoning process, constructs targeted queries, and retrieves knowledge using the designated tools. By this mechanism, the system can gradually evolve the initial single query into a semantically progressive sub-query, enabling layer-by-layer knowledge refinement from conceptual-level understanding to implementation-level details.In this paper, a prototype system is implemented on the basis of PentestGPT, a structured knowledge base is constructed, and a variety of retrieval tool sets are designed. In the experiments of 22 real vulnerability scenarios, the Agentic RAG framework improves the accuracy of penetration command generation by 36% compared with the traditional RAG, which significantly enhances the knowledge utilization rate and the ability to generate complex commands. It provides a more efficient and accurate command generation mechanism for intelligent penetration testing.
title_zh: 用于自动化渗透测试中命令生成的智能体RAG
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化渗透测试（PT）中展现出巨大潜力，但在复杂命令生成任务中，仍需依赖外部知识以获得精确输出。尽管传统的检索增强生成（RAG）方法可通过补充外部证据缓解幻觉问题，但其静态的、单轮次的检索机制难以满足渗透测试中动态的知识需求：初始检索结果可能无法覆盖推理过程中产生的知识空白。为解决这一问题，本文提出一种基于智能体RAG（Agentic RAG）的“文档内推理”（Reason-in-Document）框架，将单一查询转化为多步骤的动态检索推理过程。该框架遵循ReAct范式，智能体在推理过程中识别知识缺口，构建针对性查询，并利用指定工具进行知识检索。通过这一机制，系统能够逐步将初始单一查询演化为语义递进的子查询，实现从概念层面理解到实现层面细节的分层知识精炼。

本文基于PentestGPT构建了原型系统，建立了结构化知识库，并设计了多种检索工具集。在22个真实漏洞场景的实验中，与传统RAG相比，Agentic RAG框架将渗透命令生成的准确率提升了36%，显著提高了知识利用效率和复杂命令生成能力。该方法为智能渗透测试提供了更高效、更精准的命令生成机制。

title: MAVUL: Multi-Agent Vulnerability Detection via Contextual Reasoning and Interactive Refinement
authors: Youpeng Li, Kartik Joshi, Xinda Wang, Eric Wong
publish: 2025 IEEE 7th International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications (TPS-ISA)
abstract: The widespread adoption of open-source software (OSS) necessitates the mitigation of vulnerability risks. Most vulnerability detection (VD) methods are limited by inadequate contextual understanding, restrictive single-round interactions, and coarse-grained evaluations, resulting in undesired model performance and biased evaluation results. To address these challenges, we propose MAVUL, a novel multi-agent VD system that integrates contextual reasoning and interactive refinement. Specifically, a vulnerability analyst agent is designed to flexibly leverage tool-using capabilities and contextual reasoning to achieve cross-procedural code understanding and effectively mine vulnerability patterns. Through iterative feedback and refined decision-making within cross-role agent interactions, the system achieves reliable reasoning and vulnerability prediction. Furthermore, MAVUL introduces multi-dimensional ground truth information for fine-grained evaluation, thereby enhancing evaluation accuracy and reliability. Extensive experiments conducted on a pairwise vulnerability dataset demonstrate MAVUL's superior performance. Our findings indicate that MAVUL significantly outperforms existing multi-agent systems with over 62% higher pairwise accuracy and single-agent systems with over 600% higher average performance. The system's effectiveness is markedly improved with increased communication rounds between the vulnerability analyst agent and the security architect agent, underscoring the importance of contextual reasoning in tracing vulnerability flows and the crucial feedback role. Additionally, the integrated evaluation agent serves as a critical, unbiased judge, ensuring a more accurate and reliable estimation of the system's real-world applicability by preventing misleading binary comparisons.
title_zh: MAVUL：基于上下文推理与交互式优化的多智能体漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 开源软件（OSS）的广泛采用带来了漏洞风险的显著增加。目前大多数漏洞检测（VD）方法受限于上下文理解能力不足、交互模式单一且仅支持单轮交互，以及评估粒度粗略等问题，导致模型性能不佳且评估结果存在偏差。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新型多智能体漏洞检测系统——MAVUL，该系统融合了上下文推理与交互式优化机制。具体而言，我们设计了一个漏洞分析智能体，能够灵活运用工具并结合上下文推理，实现跨过程代码的理解，从而高效挖掘漏洞模式。通过在跨角色智能体间进行迭代反馈与精细化决策，系统实现了可靠的推理过程与精准的漏洞预测。此外，MAVUL引入了多维度真实标签信息，支持细粒度评估，显著提升了评估的准确性和可靠性。在成对漏洞数据集上开展的大量实验表明，MAVUL表现出卓越的性能：其成对检测准确率比现有多智能体系统高出超过62%，比单智能体系统高出超过600%。实验还发现，随着漏洞分析智能体与安全架构智能体之间通信轮次的增加，系统整体效能显著提升，凸显了上下文推理在追踪漏洞传播路径中的关键作用，以及反馈机制的重要价值。此外，集成的评估智能体作为公正、无偏的评判者，有效避免了误导性的二元对比，从而更准确、可靠地评估系统在真实场景中的适用性。

title: Development of Compensation Based 4:2 Compressor-Based Ultra-Low Power Approximate Multipliers
authors: Sakthimohan M, Hansa Hansa
publish: 2025 First International Conference of Advances in Engineering and Computing Technologies for Sustainable Development (AECTSD)
abstract: For applications including image processing, digital signal processing, neural networks, as well as IoT devices that are both energy-constrained and error-tolerant, the UltraLow Power Approximate Multiplier (ULPAM) presents a novel architecture for multiplication operations. Although traditional precise multipliers are accurate, they are not well-suited for battery-powered as well as edge computing contexts because of the large amounts of power and space used by their reduction trees, which are caused by intricate carry propagation. Random or approximation computation methods, on the other hand, may reduce power consumption, but they often sacrifice precision or experience higher delay as a result. Presented here is a Verilog implementation of a hybrid ULPAM architecture with two versions: one baseline (approximate_multiplier.v) that uses compensation-based 4:2 compressors using error compensation components (ECM) to strike a balance between accuracy and efficiency, and the other enhanced (hybrid_approx_mul.v) that incorporates a carry-lookahead adder (CLA) to boost speed while preserving ultra-low power characteristics. To achieve substantial reductions in switching activity and dynamic power, the design makes use of Unbiased Compressor Approximate Circuits (UCAC) variants for aggressive approximation in low-erbit rows, with ECM compensating to feed corrective carries to exact 4:2 compressors in higher bits. Validated on common FPGA platforms, the ULPAM is able to decrease the powerdelay product (PDP) through up to 40% and the area-delay product (ADP) by 25% when compared to traditional binary multipliers. This is achieved through optimising the partial product reduction tree using reordered inputs with OR-based error compensation. The functionality is confirmed across many test cases, such as 0×0, 1×1, 3×7, and 90×13, by means of comprehensive test benches (tb_multiplier.v as well as tb_hybrid_mul.v), which achieve mean error distances around 5% for the majority of inputs. The ULPAM is an adaptable framework for ultra-low power approximate computing, thanks to its modular architecture that allows for scalability to larger bit-widths and easy integration through AI accelerators or embedded systems. It also has the potential to be extended to fully stochastic bitstreams or fault-tolerant designs, which would be useful for critical uses in automotive or biomedical fields.
title_zh: 基于补偿的4:2压缩器超低功耗近似乘法器的开发
abstract_zh:
在图像处理、数字信号处理、神经网络以及对功耗敏感且容错性强的物联网设备等应用场景中，超低功耗近似乘法器（ULPAM）提出了一种全新的乘法运算架构。尽管传统精确乘法器具有高精度，但由于其复杂的进位传播导致的冗余树结构占用大量功耗和面积，使其在电池供电设备和边缘计算环境中并不理想。而随机或近似计算方法虽可降低功耗，却往往以牺牲精度或引入更高延迟为代价。

本文提出了一种基于Verilog的混合型ULPAM架构，包含两个版本：其一为基准版本（approximate_multiplier.v），采用基于误差补偿单元（ECM）的补偿型4:2压缩器，在精度与效率之间取得良好平衡；其二为增强版本（hybrid_approx_mul.v），引入进位前瞻加法器（CLA），在保持超低功耗特性的前提下显著提升运算速度。为实现显著降低开关活动和动态功耗的目标，该设计在低位比特行中采用无偏压缩近似电路（UCAC）进行激进的近似处理，同时通过ECM提供校正进位，馈入高位的精确4:2压缩器中进行修正。

在常见的FPGA平台上验证表明，与传统二进制乘法器相比，ULPAM可将功耗-延迟乘积（PDP）降低高达40%，面积-延迟乘积（ADP）降低25%。这一性能提升得益于对部分积缩减树的优化，通过重新排列输入并结合基于或门的误差补偿机制实现。通过全面的测试平台（tb_multiplier.v 和 tb_hybrid_mul.v）对多种测试用例（如 0×0、1×1、3×7 和 90×13）进行验证，结果表明该乘法器在大多数输入下平均误差距离维持在约5%的合理范围内。

得益于其模块化设计，ULPAM具备良好的可扩展性，可轻松适配更大位宽，并能便捷集成至人工智能加速器或嵌入式系统中，是一种适用于超低功耗近似计算的灵活框架。此外，该架构还具有向全随机比特流或容错设计扩展的潜力，未来在汽车电子、生物医学等对可靠性要求极高的关键领域具有重要应用前景。

title: Design and development of the RFID experimental platform based on Deepseek
authors: Xuan Zhong, Tiansong Li, Hang Liu, Hang Chai, Kang Li, Haozhuo Wang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Signal Processing, Computer Networks and Communications (SPCNC)
abstract: To meet the experimental teaching needs of radio frequency identification technology in universities, and to solve the problems of the traditional experimental platform’s single functionality, low visualization degree, and lack of mobile terminal interaction, this project has designed and implemented an RFID experimental teaching system that integrates a hardware experimental box, a Web simulation teaching platform, and an AI assistant. The experimental box is divided into two major modules: the principle machine and the application machine. The principle machine is based on a FPGA chip to implement modulation and demodulation as well as various encoding functions; the application machine uses Arduino UNO as the core to complete the reading and writing operations of ID cards in two frequency bands. Through local deployment of Deepseek, an RFID knowledge graph is constructed using the RAG architecture, and the AI assistant can immediately answer various questions such as students’ experimental operations, principle understanding, etc., achieving personalized tutoring. Meanwhile, the Web teaching platform adopts a B/S structure and embeds Simulink operation videos for ASK/FSK/PSK modulation and demodulation to help students understand the RFID circuit model and enhance learning effectiveness.
title_zh: 基于Deepseek的RFID实验平台的设计与开发
abstract_zh: 为满足高校射频识别技术实验教学的需求，解决传统实验平台功能单一、可视化程度低以及缺乏移动终端交互等问题，本项目设计并实现了一套集硬件实验箱、Web仿真教学平台与AI助教于一体的RFID实验教学系统。实验箱分为两大模块：原理机与应用机。原理机基于FPGA芯片，实现调制解调及多种编码功能；应用机以Arduino UNO为核心，完成双频段ID卡的读写操作。通过本地部署Deepseek，采用RAG架构构建了RFID知识图谱，AI助教可即时回答学生在实验操作、原理理解等方面的问题，实现个性化辅导。同时，Web教学平台采用B/S架构，嵌入ASK/FSK/PSK调制解调的Simulink操作视频，帮助学生理解RFID电路模型，提升学习效果。
